title: Glow Trims - Dynamic Lights
description: Adds real dynamic lighting to glowing armor trims from the Glow Trims mod.
body:
## Adds real dynamic lighting to glowing armor trims from the Glow Trims mod.

When you apply a glow ink sac to trimmed armor at a smithing table, the trim will now emit actual light into the world — not just an emissive texture glow.

Each trim material emits a different brightness level, with more visually striking materials like amethyst and diamond emitting more light than subtle ones like copper and netherite.
